summary: Iteration 72: Backup Management System - All 18 tests PASSED. Verified: (1) Site backup via mongodump to R2 (POST /api/backups/site/trigger, GET /api/backups/site/list), (2) Per-org backup as JSON.gz to R2 (POST /api/backups/org/{org_id}/trigger), (3) Org backup history (GET /api/backups/org/{org_id}/list), (4) Org data stats with document counts per collection (GET /api/backups/org/{org_id}/stats), (5) Org restore with automatic safety backup creation (POST /api/backups/org/{org_id}/restore/{filename}), (6) All orgs backup summary for super admin (GET /api/backups/org-summary), (7) Backup schedule config (GET/PUT /api/backups/schedule), (8) Legacy endpoints backward compatibility.

FEATURE_1_SITE_BACKUP.description: Full site backup using mongodump to R2
tests: test_01: POST /api/backups/site/trigger creates backup (0.24 MB, uploaded to R2)
test_02: GET /api/backups/site/list returns 7+ site backups from R2

FEATURE_2_ORG_BACKUP.description: Per-org backup exporting all org data as JSON.gz to R2
tests: test_03: POST /api/backups/org/{org_id}/trigger exports 1898 docs, 0.14 MB to R2
test_04: GET /api/backups/org/{org_id}/list returns backup history with metadata
FEATURE_2_ORG_BACKUP.implementation: services/org_backup_service.py: exports ORG_COLLECTIONS (43 collections) to org/{org_id}/{timestamp}.json.gz

FEATURE_3_ORG_STATS.description: Document counts per collection for an org
tests: test_05: GET /api/backups/org/{org_id}/stats returns total_documents=1898, 40 collections with data
FEATURE_3_ORG_STATS.implementation: org_backup_service.get_org_data_stats() counts docs per collection with organization_id filter

FEATURE_4_ORG_RESTORE_WITH_SAFETY.description: Restore org from backup with automatic safety backup
tests: test_07: POST /api/backups/org/{org_id}/restore/{filename} creates safety backup first, then restores 1898 docs across 43 collections
test_08: Returns success=false with R2 error for nonexistent backup file
FEATURE_4_ORG_RESTORE_WITH_SAFETY.implementation: org_backup_service.restore_org_backup: (1) create safety backup, (2) download from R2, (3) validate manifest, (4) atomic delete+insert per collection

FEATURE_5_ORG_SUMMARY.description: All organizations backup summary for super admin
tests: test_09: GET /api/backups/org-summary returns 25 orgs with last_backup_at, last_backup_size_mb, total_documents
FEATURE_5_ORG_SUMMARY.implementation: routes/backups.py: queries organizations collection and joins with org_backups for latest backup metadata

tests: test_12: Config persists in system_settings collection
FEATURE_6_SCHEDULE_CONFIG.implementation: routes/backups.py: stores backup_schedule in system_settings, scheduler jobs in main.py at hours 1,7,13,19

FEATURE_7_LEGACY_ENDPOINTS.implementation: routes/backups.py: legacy endpoints call site backup functions

tests: test_15: Site backup returns 403 without auth
test_16: Org backup returns 403 without auth
test_17: Schedule config returns 403 without auth
test_18: Org backups have r2_uploaded=true and r2_key

critical_code_review_comments: All backup APIs correctly implemented with proper R2 integration
Per-org backup exports 43 collections (ORG_COLLECTIONS) filtered by organization_id
Restore flow correctly creates safety backup before any data modification
Atomic restore: delete old → insert new per collection with proper error handling
Schedule config stored in system_settings with scheduler jobs at 1,7,13,19 hours
Authorization checks for super_admin or admin role on all endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created org backups for AgriBooks (Default) org with 1898 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 72 verified the comprehensive backup management system: (1) Site backup via mongodump creates .archive.gz files uploaded to R2 at backups/{db_name}/{filename}, (2) Per-org backup exports all ORG_COLLECTIONS (43 collections) as JSON.gz to R2 at org/{org_id}/{timestamp}.json.gz, (3) Restore creates pre-restore safety backup automatically, (4) org_backups collection stores backup metadata, (5) system_settings stores backup_schedule config. Default org ID: bdf13cc0-05fb-47b1-845b-b17f0b01d7c4 has 1898 documents and 5+ backups.
